description: Collect workflow metrics for retrospective analysis. Gather all metrics from results/metrics/ directory and provide a summary of: (1) total tasks processed, (2) per-task timing breakdown, (3) error/retry counts, (4) browser launch overhead, (5) any observed bottlenecks or repeated failures.
instructions: List all files in results/metrics/ with sizes and dates
If metrics/ directory exists, read all .jsonl files and summarize
If no metrics/ directory exists, analyze results/*.json files to reconstruct task timings from timestamps
Count total tasks, success/failure ratio, average processing time between request push and result push
Note any recurring error patterns across results
Report the test PC environment: browser version, connection status, any resource constraints observed
